title: Cloudcomputing ai trading
author: Informal-Advance3452
selftext:
CLOUDCOMPUTING

this is a direct replacement for stronghold which went down a month or so back, stronghold had a life span of 3/4 months so this one will have roughly the same, it’s been going a month already and is getting more users every day, the daily profit ratio is 4%-5.7%, not as lucrative as those new platforms offer four day money back, but as a result this one will outlast those by months. 

https://cloudcomputing.vip/#/signup?p=Monochrome
